productDisplayName: Clarks Men Manly Alpine Brown Casual Shoe
description: Two tone high-top ankle boots with a full-grain leather finish from clarks for men. D-ring fastening riveted to the upper for an in-your-face rugged vibe. Crafted with the Polyveldt construction, this boot references the rough and tough Alpine lifestyle. An attractive distressed effect on the upper. Upper Leather upper with textile lining Central lace-ups with D-ring eyelets Cushioned footbed High top styling Stitch detailing with overlays on the midfoot and rearfoot region Upper stitched to the outsole for maximum durability Outsole TPR outsike with multi-directional lugs and branding on the midfoot shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
